content:
Round-B-Goal-state: ADDRESSED

Additional-drift:
- `spec.md:86-87` — Goal state still says the marker file is written by "per-surface hooks." That contradicts locked D8/Q2/Q3/Q4/Q5: only Claude uses an actual hook; Codex is config-watcher-based; Gemini/Copilot are manual-only.
- `spec.md:543,552` — Session 3 still plans `installOrchestratorHookCodex.ts` and says `package.json` gets "4 new commands." That contradicts locked D8/Q3/Goal state, which say Codex has **no user-facing installer**.

VERDICT: REJECTED (replace `per-surface hooks` in Goal state with hook/shim/manual-writer wording, and remove the Codex installer-command/file references so Session 3 adds only the Gemini installer command, Copilot installer command, and manual-override command)
